title: Hooks & Lifecycle
description: Agent extensibility via lifecycle hooks — intercept, observe, and control agent behavior at key points in the workflow

features.title: Session start hook
features.description: Fire a hook when an agent session begins or resumes

features.title: Session end hook
features.description: Fire a hook when an agent session terminates

features.title: Pre-tool-use hook
features.description: Run custom code before any tool executes

features.title: Post-tool-use hook
features.description: Run custom code after a tool completes

features.title: User prompt submit hook
features.description: Intercept or augment user prompts before they are processed

features.title: Stop / turn-end hook
features.description: Fire a hook when the agent finishes a turn, with the ability to continue

features.title: Permission request hook
features.description: Hook into the permission/approval flow to auto-allow, deny, or defer

features.title: Pre-shell-execution hook
features.description: Hook specifically before shell/terminal commands, separate from generic pre-tool-use

features.title: Pre-file-read hook
features.description: Hook before the agent reads a file

features.title: Pre-file-write hook
features.description: Hook before the agent writes or edits a file

features.title: Post-file-edit hook
features.description: Hook after a file is modified, useful for linting or formatting

features.title: Pre-MCP-tool-use hook
features.description: Hook specifically before MCP tool invocations, separate from generic pre-tool-use

features.title: Subagent start hook
features.description: Fire a hook when a subagent is spawned

features.title: Subagent stop hook
features.description: Fire a hook when a subagent completes

features.title: Context compaction hooks
features.description: Hooks before and/or after context window compaction

features.title: Error event hook
features.description: Fire a hook when the agent encounters an error

features.title: Post-agent-response hook
features.description: Fire a hook after the agent produces a response message

features.title: File watch hook
features.description: Fire a hook when a watched file changes on disk during the session

features.title: Worktree hooks
features.description: Hooks for git worktree creation and removal

features.title: Command handlers
features.description: Execute shell scripts as hook handlers (bash/powershell)

features.title: Prompt handlers
features.description: Use an LLM prompt as a hook handler for yes/no decisions

features.title: HTTP handlers
features.description: Send hook payloads to HTTP/webhook endpoints

features.title: MCP tool handlers
features.description: Call a tool on a connected MCP server as a hook handler

features.title: Agent handlers
features.description: Spawn a subagent with tool access as a hook handler

features.title: Blocking hooks
features.description: Pre-hooks can block the action via exit code (typically exit 2)

features.title: Async / fire-and-forget hooks
features.description: Hooks that run in the background without blocking the agent

features.title: Matcher patterns
features.description: Filter which tools or events a hook applies to via name or regex

features.title: JSON stdin/stdout protocol
features.description: Hooks receive context as JSON on stdin and return structured output on stdout

features.title: Configurable timeout
features.description: Per-hook timeout setting to prevent runaway hooks

features.title: Project-level hooks
features.description: Hooks configured at the project/repo level, shareable via version control

features.title: User-level hooks
features.description: Hooks configured globally for the current user across all projects

features.title: Organization-level hooks
features.description: Hooks enforced via managed policy for an entire org or team
